description_long: This is a vintage box-style television with a dark woodgrain exterior casing and a large, convex glass screen dominating the front. The front panel features a metallic silver bezel surrounding the screen, with a speaker grille and a vertical row of control dials and buttons on the right side. The television has a rectangular, blocky form with flat top and side surfaces, and integrated handles on both sides for easier lifting. The back is plain and unadorned, showing only the woodgrain finish. The overall design is reminiscent of late 20th-century CRT televisions, with robust construction and a utilitarian aesthetic.
description: A vintage box-style television with a woodgrain exterior, large convex glass screen, and metallic control panel on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the convex glass screen, metallic bezel, speaker grille, and vertical control panel with dials and buttons.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the woodgrain finish and a recessed handle for carrying.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, uninterrupted woodgrain surface with no visible ports or features.
description_view_3: Right side view with another recessed handle, mirroring the left side.
attribute_bezel_design: Thick metallic silver bezel with black trim, rectangular, and a utilitarian style.
attribute_control_button_layout: Vertical row of dials and buttons on the front right panel.
